What We Do

Our Services

Professional tree removal solutions tailored to your needs.

Tree Removal

Safe and complete tree removal for any size or species in Minneapolis.

Learn More →

Stump Grinding

Efficient stump grinding to eliminate unsightly remnants and prevent regrowth.

Learn More →

Tree Trimming

Professional tree trimming and pruning to maintain tree health and appearance.

Learn More →

Emergency Tree Service

24/7 emergency tree removal and storm damage cleanup in Minneapolis.

Learn More →

Land Clearing

Efficient and environmentally-conscious land clearing for construction and development projects.

Learn More →

Storm Damage Cleanup

Comprehensive cleanup services after storms, including debris removal and tree damage repair.

Learn More →
Flexible Options

Financing That Works With Your Goals

We believe every customer deserves access to top-quality tree removal services. That's why we offer flexible options to fit any budget. No stress, no surprises — just a clear path forward.

  • Low monthly payments
  • Quick approval process
  • No hidden fees

Reviews

Trusted By Our Community

VK Tree & Stump Service did an amazing job removing a large oak tree from my backyard. The crew was professional, efficient, and very careful not to damage my fence or landscaping. The stump grinding was thorough, and they cleaned up everything perfectly. Highly recommend!

Sarah M.
★★★★★

I had two large stumps in my front yard that were an eyesore. VK Tree & Stump Service came out and ground them down quickly and efficiently. They filled the holes with topsoil and seeded the area. The price was reasonable, and the service was excellent.

David K.
★★★★

VK Tree & Stump Service trimmed several trees on my property, removing dead branches and improving the overall shape. They were very knowledgeable and took the time to explain the best pruning techniques for each tree. I will definitely use them again.

Emily L.
★★★★★

A large branch fell on my roof during a storm. VK Tree & Stump Service responded immediately and removed the branch safely and efficiently. They prevented further damage to my house and provided excellent customer service.

John S.
★★★★★

VK Tree & Stump Service cleared a large area of land for my new construction project. They removed all the trees, stumps, and brush quickly and efficiently. The site was left clean and ready for building. Highly recommend their land clearing services.

Jessica R.
★★★★★

After a severe thunderstorm, VK Tree & Stump Service helped me clean up the debris and remove several damaged trees. They were very professional and efficient. I appreciated their quick response and thorough cleanup.

Michael B.
★★★★
Read All Reviews →
How It Works

We'll Guide You Through!

From first call to final walkthrough, here's what to expect.

01

Contact Our Team

Reach out by phone or through our online form. We'll schedule a time that works best for you.

02

Inspection

Our certified team will thoroughly evaluate your needs and provide a detailed, transparent estimate.

03

We Get to Work

Our experienced team handles everything — from start to finish — with precision and care.

04

Final Walkthrough

We walk through the completed work with you to ensure every detail meets our high standards.

Our Promise

Why Choose VK Tree & Stump Service LLC

Excellence

We hold ourselves to the highest standards on every single job — no shortcuts, no compromises.

Community

We're your neighbors first. Every job we complete strengthens the community we call home.

Integrity

Honest pricing, transparent communication, and doing what we say we'll do — every single time.

FAQ

Your Questions, Our Expert Advice

Do I need a permit to remove a tree in Minneapolis?
In many cases, yes. The City of Minneapolis has regulations regarding tree removal, especially for boulevard trees or trees on protected properties. We can assist you in obtaining the necessary permits.
How much does tree removal cost?
The cost of tree removal depends on several factors, including the size and species of the tree, its location, and the complexity of the removal process. We offer free estimates to provide you with an accurate quote.
What do you do with the removed tree?
We recycle as much of the tree as possible. The wood can be processed into firewood or mulch, and the debris is often taken to a composting facility. We strive to minimize waste and promote sustainable practices.

Excellence. Community. Integrity.
That's VK Tree & Stump Service LLC.

Ready to get started? Fill out the form and our team will be in touch within 24 hours.
